strings.login.subtitle: Set app limits for yourself and let trusted friends approve extra time.
strings.friends.title: Friends
strings.friends.subtitle: Add friends with their Friend ID. Friends can only resolve requests for limits you assign to them.
strings.limits.title: Limits
strings.limits.subtitle: Create limits, choose apps, set minutes, and assign friends who can approve extra time.
strings.limits.none: No limits yet. Tap New limit to start.
strings.limits.select_individual_apps: Select individual apps to show exact app usage.
strings.request.title: Request Time
strings.request.subtitle: Select one of your limits and ask assigned friends for extra minutes.
strings.request.open_exists: You already have an open request for this limit.
strings.request.create_first: Create and select a limit first.
strings.approvals.title: Requests
strings.approvals.subtitle: Approve or decline requests assigned to you.
strings.settings.title: Settings
strings.editor.delete_message: This removes the limit and stops its Screen Time tracking.
strings.name.title: What should friends call you?
strings.name.subtitle: This name appears in friend requests and time requests.
strings.dev.title: Dev
strings.dev.subtitle: Debug-only checks for CloudKit, push notifications, schema, and refresh.
strings.dev.schema_help: Run this from an Xcode Development build after deleting CloudKit schema, then deploy Development schema to Production for TestFlight.
